Last week chance grab lunch Ybor with friend Laughing Cat, Italian restaurant corner Ave. 15th (several doors down from Tampa Brewing Company location).
While never been Laughing before, this friend also read that offered lunch buffet that worth checking out.
According Laughing co-owner Franco LoRe, name restaurant comes from name cafe Venice, Italy ("Il Gatto Cheride" Italian) where girls younger man.
Laughing tucked into relatively small corner space, feels comfortable inside.
arrived towards lunch crowd both decided upon lunch buffet.
seemed hard wrong nine bucks person; everyone else seemed doing buffet too.
buffet isn't large, offers several cold Italian dishes, ranging from ravioli pasta dishes, both vodka sauce, mozzarella caprese (I'm sucker fresh chunks mozzarella) delicious salad filled with plump shrimp.
only mildly disappointing dish meatballs sauce that almost gone when there.
Again, this wasn't buffet, certainly higher quality than expected real deal nine bucks each.
lunch buffet only available during work week.
Service fine last week lunch, don't know what little place like night weekends when gets busy.
also curious what ordering menu like.
plan Laughing rotation Ybor restaurants that like, which includes original location Columbia, sandwich shop Tropicana at-times-maligned City Tavern.
I've previously panned most part experiences with Samurai Blue Creperia.
haven't tried Carmine's, Acropolis Bernini.
I'll this buffet mini-kick.
what's your favorite Ybor restaurant?
Bottom-line: happen Ybor lunch during work week, you're mood homemade Italian cuisine, Laughing Cat's lunch buffet worth giving try.
Inspection Scorecard: Last Inspection: January 2007 violations Critical (8), Non-Critical (2).
Sunday decided stop Creperia, relatively French bistro Ave. Ybor City that specializes crepes.
restaurant located between Italian Club Terrazza.
eaten Creperia times before first visit extremely nice owner).
last visit with large group some months service been wholly underwhelming.
giving places second chances, though, especially unique potentially tasty concept like Creperia.
addition traditional desert crepes, Creperia offers huge selection crepes entrees stuffed with almost anything imagine.
ordered Oppa Mexicana crepe (the server plainly told idea" what items menu were spicy, Caesar salad while Traci ordered Prego (roast turkey) crepe.
Caesar overloaded with dressing, used iceberg lettuce romaine), lonely croutons.
crepe okay, flavors stood overwhelmed sour cream salsa top.
bite Traci's crepe thought okay, pointed that different cheese used than what menu.
would have ordered desert crepe, after slow clueless service, patience shot.
couple table near looked equally frustrated.
Bottom-line: Creperia have unique concept, execution been muddled last visits.
wouldn't back more than final dessert crepe (the Romeo Julieta nutella, banana strawberries tasty).
Inspection Scorecard: Last Inspection: October 2005 violations Critical (3), Non-Critical (0).
Yesterday lunch went Tropicana, which quickly become favorite lunch spot Ybor City.
While Columbia restaurant mind most folks when comes good food Ybor, I've eaten various Columbia locations many times before, Tropicana tops book authentic Cuban food Ybor.
Compared Columbia, Tropicana block.
Columbia dates back 1905, Tropicana since 1963.
ordered "the special" which half Cuban sandwich good sized portion) bowl black bean soup.
tried order chicken salad, which they were forced have Cuban instead.
Traci greek salad.
Every meal comes with warm Cuban bread with butter.
Tropicana's Cuban bread this world reminds Orleans french bread.
counter which puts more hustle bustle wait staff.
Service quick, prices great (cash only, though, this school family run) food consistently notch authentic comes.
great no-frills lunch spot.
factoid that President Bush stopped Tropicana lunch when town years ago.
Tropicana proudly displays picture visit their register.
Bottom-line: Great Cuban food extremely affordable prices historic setting.
visit Ybor during complete without grabbing bite Tropicana.

Botanically, African star apple known Chrysophyllum albidum, common seasonal fruit beloved Ghana.
Research conducted African Research Review reveals that African star fruit contains some vital nutrients needed body daily doses.
example, fruit excellent source calcium vitamin which goes long strengthen bones.
According Professor Ignatius Onimawo College Science Technology, Covenant University Nigeria, nutrients fruit also reduce intensity abdominal bloating cramps women.
Other nutritional elements present include vitamins crude fibre, lipids, protein iron.
It's abundant, cheap readily available those months.
knows?
Maybe will commercialized product pick supermarket shelves.
Till then, enjoy 'alasa' snack time dessert after meals.
